---
name: Engineering Task
about: Plan an implementation task before creating a branch
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Task Goal

Describe what this task is trying to achieve.

## Implementation Approach

Describe the intended implementation path, affected modules, and expected tests.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] The implementation is complete for this task scope.
- [ ] Unit or integration tests were added or updated.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with no errors or warnings.
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` or `pnpm test:coverage` passes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if structure, commands, or behavior changed.
